first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance. The scores are the same, and the justification, strengths, and concerns are paraphrases of each other, focusing on the same core points (strong technical breadth, lack of strategic leadership evidence). The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new ideas or shift the focus of the critique in a way that suggests bias.
